subcodes.first_line: The mention of thy remembrance hath reached the Prisoner, and this wondrous Book hath been revealed unto thee, that thou mayest be mindful of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المسجون و نزل لک هذا الکتاب البدیع لیجعلک متذکرا فی امره و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
